channel.title: Terms of Service on STDCT
channel.description: Recent content in Terms of Service on STDCT

item.title: Implementation
item.description: Description of implmentation. Description of implmentation. Description of implmentation. Description of implmentation. Description of implmentation.

item.title: Objective of TDC 2.0
item.description: This TDC 2.0 project aims to translate the results of TDC 1.0 into actual data centre deployment and adoption.

item.title: Overview
item.description: The Sustainable Tropical Data Centre Testbed (STDCT) is the first data centre testbed in the tropics, set up to enhance Singapore’s competitiveness in sustainable and efficient data centre solutions, for the region’s challenging high-temperature and humidity operations.

item.title: Overview of TDC 2.0
item.description: Abstract This TDC2 project plans to follow a translation model as illustrated in the above Figure.

item.title: Research Tasks
item.description: Quantifying Energy Saving Quantify energy savings of TDC in a standalone and mixed data center deployment scenarios Measure of cooling energy, IT energy while capture the responses of the IT equipment to higher temperatures.

item.title: Testbed Design
item.description: Layout Description of layouts. Description of layouts. Description of layouts. Description of layouts. Description of layouts.

item.title: Testbed Design
item.description: Server Room Design Description of Server Room Design. Description of Server Room Design. Description of Server Room Design.
